verdict.answer_first: A and B both lead with the command, but A is slightly cleaner: "On macOS: lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill" appears immediately without extra bullets.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to the main recommendation and one force option; B surveys extras like "Quick variants" and "fuser -k 8080/tcp".
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now because it gives the exact command, the force fallback, and the inspect-first command without distracting variants.
